description: This file implements the SignInScreen component for a mobile app using React Native. It provides user interface elements for signing in, manages form state, and handles user authentication via context.

methods.name: SignInScreen
methods.description: Functional React component rendering the Sign In screen, managing form state, handling authentication API call, and navigation.

methods.name: onSubmit
methods.description: Handles the sign-in process, manages loading state, and error handling.
